chapter_title.en: Gender differences in jealousy as heresy versus belief

text: ١٢٤. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): غَيْرَةُ الْمَرْأَةِ كُفْرٌ وَغَيْرَةُ الرَّجُلِ إِيمَانٌ.

en.sayed-ali-raza: 124. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: The jealousy of a woman (with co-wives) is heresy, while the jealousy of a man is a part of belief.
